requirements.R1: R1: precedence(tree, 'close order', 'record order receipt') and receive_exist(tree, 'receivedOrder')
requirements.R2: R2: leads_to(tree, 'perform production action', 'perform quality check')
requirements.R4: R4: precedence(tree, 'close order', 'record payment') and precedence(tree, 'close order', 'record rejection') and exists(tree, 'record payment') and exists(tree, 'record rejection')
requirements.R5: R5: receive_exist(tree, 'payment') and leads_to(tree, 'receive payment', 'report payment')
requirements.R7: R7: leads_to(tree, 'fill order', 'send invoice') and send_exist(tree, 'invoice')

requirements.R2: leads_to(tree, 'production action', 'perform quality check') and leads_to(tree, 'perform quality check', 'deliver product')
requirements.R3: precedence(tree, 'close order', 'record payment') and precedence(tree, 'close order', 'record rejection') and exists(tree, 'record payment') and exists(tree, 'record rejection')
requirements.R4: activity_receives(tree, 'receive payment', 'payment') and leads_to(tree, 'receive payment', 'report payment')
requirements.R5: leads_to(tree, 'fill order', 'ship product') and activity_sends(tree, 'send invoice', 'invoice') and leads_to(tree, 'fill order', 'send invoice')

requirements.R1: leads_to(tree,'record order','close order') and activity_sends(tree,'record order','receivedOrderRecord')
requirements.R2: leads_to(tree,'perform production action','perform quality check') and leads_to(tree,'perform quality check','deliver product')
requirements.R3: leads_to(tree,'record payment','close order') and leads_to(tree,'record rejection','close order') and exists(tree,'record payment') and exists(tree,'record rejection') and activity_sends(tree,'record payment','paymentRecord') and activity_sends(tree,'record rejection','rejectionRecord')
requirements.R5: leads_to(tree,'fill order','ship product') and leads_to(tree,'fill order','send invoice') and activity_sends(tree,'send invoice','invoice')

requirements.R2: leads_to(tree, 'perform production action', 'perform quality check') and precedence(tree, 'deliver product', 'perform quality check')
requirements.R3: precedence(tree, 'close order', 'record payment') or precedence(tree, 'close order', 'record rejection')
requirements.R5: leads_to(tree, 'fill order', 'ship product') and leads_to(tree, 'fill order', send_exist(tree, 'invoice'))
